properties.remark: HAIL COVERING THE GROUND
1 TREE REPORTED DOWN NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF REYNOLDS AND HORTON ROADS.
AT LEAST 15 TREES DOWN AND ONE HOUSE DAMAGED. SWATH OF DAMAGE BEGAN IN THE 300 BLOCK OF 102ND AVENUE AND CONTINUED TO THE 100 TO 200 BLOCK OF 106TH AVENUE. HOUSE WAS DAMAGED ON 3RD STREET.

NWS SURVEY CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO DAMAGE TO TREES AND STRUCTURES. A HORSE BARN AND AN ADJACENT TRAILER WERE DAMAGED. THERE WAS ALSO DAMAGE TO GRAVEL YARD EQUIPMENT. IT LOFTED A TANK AND ALSO UPROOTED OR SNAPPED OFF NUMEROUS LARGE TREES. MINOR ROOF DAMAGE OCCURED THROUGH THE LOSS OF SHINGLES. THE TRACK LENGTH WAS 5.0 MILES. THE ENDPOINT WAS 42.49N...85.51W.
SEVERAL TREES DOWN AROUND PINE LAKE. THIS WAS A CONTINUATION OF THE DAMAGE PATH FROM PLAINWELL.
NWS SURVEY CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO DAMAGE TO TREES AND STRUCTURES. PRELIMINARY DAMAGE TRACK LENGTH OF 3.8 MILES INTO BARRY COUNTY WITH ENDPOINT AROUND 42.47N...85.53W. SURVERY STILL IS UNDERWAY.
HAIL WAS COVERING THE GROUND WITH A FEW BROKEN WINDSHIELDS.
THE HAIL DENTED THE FAMILY CAR BUT DID NOT BREAK THE WINDSHIELD.

A BOW ECHO TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT 925PM EDT AND TRAVELED ENE FOR APPROXIMATELY 1.3 MILES BEFORE LIFTING AT APPROXIMATELY 927PM. THE DAMAGE RANGED FROM 50-300 YDS IN WIDTH. DAMAGE WAS PRIMARILY TREE BLOW DOWN OF EF1 INTENSITY. TOUCHDOWN LOCATION WAS AT 44.1059N / 86.4472W AND DISSIPATED AT 44.1073N / 86.4224W.

A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN JUST WEST OF PAW PAW. DAMAGE TO TREES WAS FOUND ALONG WITH A TWISTED METAL FENCE NEAR A SCHOOL. THE TORNADO THEN MOVED INTO THE TOWN OF PAW PAW. DAMAGE TO A CAR DEALERSHIP OCCURRED. A RESTAURANT ALSO SUSTAINED DAMAGE FROM FALLEN TREES. THE TORNADO LIFTED AT LATITUDE 42.2143 AND LONGITUDE -85.8801. THE TORNADO WAS ON THE GROUND FOR NEARLY TWO MILES AND RATED EF1.
